# UX Checklist: Precompute Grid-Level Features

**Purpose**: Validate job status visibility and warnings.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/030-precompute-grid-features/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Job Visibility

- [ ] CHK-UX-001 Job status panel shows job status and timestamps. Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI surface optional per UC-30.
- [ ] CHK-UX-002 Summary metrics and warnings are visible. Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI surface optional per UC-30.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [ ] CHK-UX-003 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Precompute job", "Status", "Warnings"). Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI surface optional per UC-30.
- [ ] CHK-UX-004 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate. Note: Not necessary for core spec; no required UI.
